emails.body: Research Get-Together at Sandeep Kohli's New Home Hello everyone: Here is your invitation and a map to Sandeep's home. See you Saturday!

emails.subject_base: Research Get-Together at Sandeep Kohli's New Home
emails.body: Research Get-Together at Sandeep Kohli's New Home Hi everyone. Please rsvp to me by tomorrow if you will be attending the party on Saturday. If you plan on attending, please let me know what dish you will bring. Thanks! Shirley

emails.subject: Re: Research Get-Together at Sandeep Kohli's New Home
emails.subject_base: Research Get-Together at Sandeep Kohli's New Home
emails.body: Re: Research Get-Together at Sandeep Kohli's New Home Shirley, I shall come. I shall bring a cake. I may be late, coming around 2:00. I expect some people who will come to give me an estimate and they come when they come. Vince
